implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Clean, minimal implementation that satisfies both acceptance criteria exactly. Three lines of JSX added to page.tsx — a semantic `<footer>` with dynamic year and 'BrewBoard' text, appropriate Tailwind styling, no tests, no docs, no refactoring. The only marginal concerns are that the footer sits inside `<main>` (minor HTML semantics) and `©` is used where a literal © character is more idiomatic in JSX — neither materially affects the feature.

requirements.notes: Both acceptance criteria met: footer present at the bottom of the page, contains copyright symbol with dynamic current year and 'BrewBoard'. Out-of-scope constraints (no tests, no docs, no refactoring) respected.

correctness.notes: JSX is syntactically valid. `new Date().getFullYear()` correctly computes the current year at render time. `©` renders ©. Tailwind classes are valid. No type, logic, or integration errors visible.

minimality.notes: 3-line addition to one component file plus the workflow log file. No existing code touched. Exactly the change the spec described.

code_quality.notes: Readable, well-structured JSX. Styling choices (stone-500, text-sm, text-center, mt-8) are appropriate for a subdued footer. Minor: `©` HTML entity is valid in JSX but the © literal character is more conventional in modern React.

risk.notes: Very low risk. One minor semantic concern: `<footer>` is nested inside `<main>`, whereas the HTML5 spec recommends footer as a sibling. For a single-page component this is inconsequential and the spec itself directed the change to page.tsx, so no deduction beyond style.
